user.name: Jeffrey Towson 陶迅
user.description: I help increase online growth and strengthen digital AI moats. Digital & AI mgmt consultant. Get my free email and Tech Strategy podcast.

fullText:
TENCENT’S AI AGENT SURGE: WORKBUDDY, CODEBUDDY, AND QCLAW TAKE CENTER STAGE

Tencent has launched a specialized trio of AI agents

1: WorkBuddy is a general everyday assistant for workflows like documents and presentations. 

This is their flagship agent. It is going international soon.

2: CodeBuddy is for developer and software development tasks

3: QClaw is a personal local desktop automation agent. This is available internationally. 

These agents connect with WeChat and WeChat Work to leverage Tencent's massive communication ecosystem.

This product rollout highlights Tencent's focus on high value use cases within its core distribution channels. 

Read here for more.

#workbuddy #codebuddy #qclaw #tencent

fullText:
I have been building an RSI harness since about late November. It works fantastically well at a number of problems: top 18% in most Kaggle competitions, new techniques for ARC-AGI 2, discovers model optimizations. 

It mainly lacks creativity. Once we resolve that, RSI is near.
